details.failingMessage: Access denied for draftOrderComplete field. Required access: `write_draft_orders` access scope. Also: The user must have access to mark as paid, or set payment terms.
details.activeCredentialSummary: the active conformance credential is a Shopify user access token (`shpca_...`) sent as raw `X-Shopify-Access-Token` on this host

notes: Merchant-realistic draft-to-order completion scaffold. The checked-in proxy request captures draft status/ready state, invoice URL, completed timestamp, total price, line items, and the nested `DraftOrder.order` link plus key regular-order fields while still avoiding the stale non-schema top-level `DraftOrderCompletePayload.order` selection that Shopify rejects on this host. Live capture remains blocked until the conformance install can complete draft orders.
